interpretation: PROP-069 mechanical recalibration deployed cleanly. The 54% reduction in uncited paragraphs (3668→1680) matches PROP-069 projection of 55% (3668→1640) within +2.4%, well inside the ±25% tolerance. The remaining 1,680 claim-uncited paragraphs concentrate in curmudgeon.reviews and represent the genuine claim-backing gap that the deferred follow-up curmudgeon-citation-discipline PROP will address. The 17 bogus-anchor + 10 file-missing both come in well under the 20-flat caps — the CITATION_RE hardening + WELL_KNOWN_PATHS auto-resolution worked better than projected (auto-resolved=6). Citation-resolve at 54.2% is still RED vs ≥85% target but materially better than the pre-recalibration ~60% verified rate would have been under the new accounting. RED on claim-uncited is the EXPECTED, ACTIONABLE state per PROP-069 §6 — the next step is the deferred behavioral follow-up.
deploy_decision: PROCEED — delta_pct within tolerance, no surprise regressions, mechanical caps pass cleanly.
